title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
